obligations.rule: Cover the true branch of the condition `/\s/.test(tld)` at line 41.
obligations.why: This branch is currently uncovered and corresponds to rejecting TLDs containing spaces.

obligations.rule: Cover the true branch of the condition `part.length > 63 && !options.ignore_max_length` at line 52.
obligations.why: This branch is currently uncovered and corresponds to rejecting domain parts exceeding 63 characters when `ignore_max_length` is false.
